stories.title: Sources: Suns land Bridges in deal with Hornets
stories.summary: The Hornets are trading Miles Bridges, a 2029 first-round pick and a second-round pick to the Suns for Grayson Allen, Royce O'Neale and a 2033 first.

stories.title: Co-hosts Canada beat SA to book 1st last-16 spot
stories.summary: Stephen Eustáquio scored in the second minute of second-half stoppage time, and Canada beat South Africa 1-0 on Sunday for their first knockout match victory in a World Cup.

stories.title: Schwarber sets Phils mark with MLB-best 30th HR
stories.summary: Phillies slugger Kyle Schwarber became the first major leaguer to reach 30 homers this season and the fastest to do so in franchise history.

stories.title: McFarland, ESPN's No. 3 WR commits to Texas A&M
stories.summary: Five-star wide receiver Eric McFarland, a 5-foot-8, 180-pound class of 2027 player from Florida's IMG Academy who is ranked third by ESPN at his position, chose Texas A&M on Sunday, selecting the Aggies over offers from Florida, Georgia and Tennessee.

stories.title: Lynx's Reeve ties WNBA wins record with 379th
stories.summary: Cheryl Reeve tied Mike Thibault's WNBA record for career coaching wins at 379 as the Minnesota Lynx beat the Dallas Wings 85-77 on Sunday.
